examples: A project to build a new sarcophagus over the damaged reactor lacks funds.
Sands still half-cover the newfound Greco-Roman sarcophagus, shown in mid-excavation.
The sarcophagus was found so splintered that it must have been deliberately shattered, co-curator David Mevorah said.
Asked whether Alexander's sarcophagus would be returned to Lebanon, Mr Gunay and his interpreter simply ignore the question.
